title: Subqueries, CTEs, Set Operations, and Relational Reasoning · Relational Lens: Scalar Table Subqueries

objectives: Choose scalar, row, and table subqueries whose cardinality matches their surrounding expression.

content.code:
-- Worked focus: sql-scalar-table-subqueries — Choose scalar, row, and table subqueries whose cardinality matches their surrounding expression.
WITH team_counts AS (
  SELECT team_id, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
  FROM tickets
  GROUP BY team_id
)
SELECT teams.name, COALESCE(team_counts.ticket_count, 0) AS ticket_count
FROM teams
LEFT JOIN team_counts USING (team_id)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM tickets
  WHERE tickets.team_id = teams.team_id AND status = 'investigating'
)
ORDER BY teams.name;
content.caption: Runnable relational query or data-system contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
